author: maxine-at-forecast--noether--fix-agent-init-reinit
content: Plan: Restructure agent::init() to handle malformed agent.json gracefully. Three changes: (1) Add --force flag to AgentCommands::Init in main.rs, (2) Change init() to match on AgentConfig::load() Result instead of using ? — Ok(Some) without force bails, Err warns and proceeds (malformed file), Ok(None) proceeds normally, Ok(Some) with force warns and overwrites, (3) Add tests for malformed-file reinit and --force overwrite.
